title: MES
description: Manufacturing Execution System built with TypeScript. A complex full-stack application managing production workflows and real-time data.

title: Nitrutsav
description: Official website for NIT Rourkela's annual cultural festival, featuring event schedules, registrations, and live updates.

title: SplitWise
description: TypeScript-based expense-sharing app enabling users to split bills, track shared costs, and manage group balances seamlessly.

title: IPL Data Analysis
description: Comprehensive data analysis of Indian Premier League matches from 2008 to 2024, uncovering key insights and trends.

title: Hand Detection
description: Computer vision project using Python for real-time hand detection and tracking using OpenCV and mediapipe.

title: Squid Game Website
description: Interactive website inspired by the popular series, featuring themed UI elements and immersive visual design.

title: Basic Notes App
description: Simple and efficient note-taking application built with EJS and Node.js with full CRUD functionality.

title: Smart Weather App
description: Real-time weather application integrating weather APIs to display current conditions, forecasts, and meteorological data worldwide.

title: Smarak
description: Developed and maintained the official digital platform for Smarak, the annual technical festival of the Department of Civil Engineering at NIT Rourkela.
